datatype Option<T> = None | Some(value: T)

ghost function TheBy<K, V>(m: map<K, V>, p: K -> bool): K
  requires exists k :: k in m && p(k)
  requires forall k1, k2 :: k1 in m && k2 in m && p(k1) && p(k2) ==> k1 == k2
  ensures TheBy(m, p) in m && p(TheBy(m, p))
{
  var k :| k in m && p(k); k
}

ghost function SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s: set<LineItem>): int
  decreases s
{
  if s == {} then 0
  else var x :| x in s; x.line_total + SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {x})
}

lemma SumBy_LineItem_line_totalEq(s: set<LineItem>, x: LineItem)
  requires x in s
  ensures SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s) == x.line_total + SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {x})
  decreases |s|
{
  var y :| y in s && SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s) == y.line_total + SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {y});
  if y != x {
    calc {
      SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s);
      y.line_total + SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {y});
      { SumBy_LineItem_line_totalEq(s - {y}, x); }
      y.line_total + x.line_total + SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {y} - {x});
      { assert s - {y} - {x} == s - {x} - {y}; }
      y.line_total + x.line_total + SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {x} - {y});
      { SumBy_LineItem_line_totalEq(s - {x}, y); }
      x.line_total + SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {x});
    }
  }
}

lemma SumBy_LineItem_line_totalAdd(s: set<LineItem>, x: LineItem)
  requires x !in s
  ensures SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s + {x}) == SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s) + x.line_total
{
  SumBy_LineItem_line_totalEq(s + {x}, x);
  assert (s + {x}) - {x} == s;
}

lemma SumBy_LineItem_line_totalRemove(s: set<LineItem>, x: LineItem)
  requires x in s
  ensures SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s - {x}) == SumBy_LineItem_line_total(s) - x.line_total
{
  SumBy_LineItem_line_totalEq(s, x);
}

datatype OrderStatus = DRAFT | PLACED | PAID | SHIPPED | DELIVERED | CANCELLED | RETURNED
datatype PaymentStatus = PENDING | AUTHORIZED | CAPTURED | REFUNDED | FAILED

type Money = int
predicate MoneyWhere(value: int)
{
  value >= 0
}
type Quantity = int
predicate QuantityWhere(value: int)
{
  value > 0
}
type SKU = string
predicate SKUWhere(value: string)
{
  (|value| >= 3 && |value| <= 20)
}
type OrderId = int
predicate OrderIdWhere(value: int)
{
  value > 0
}
type CustomerId = int
predicate CustomerIdWhere(value: int)
{
  value > 0
}

datatype Product = Product(sku: SKU, name: string, price: int, description: Option<string>, active: bool)

predicate ProductInv(x: Product)
{
  (|x.name| >= 1)
  && (SKUWhere(x.sku))
  && (MoneyWhere(x.price))
  && (x.price > 0)
}
datatype LineItem = LineItem(id: int, order_id: OrderId, product_sku: SKU, quantity: Quantity, unit_price: int, line_total: int)

predicate LineItemInv(x: LineItem)
{
  (x.id > 0)
  && (OrderIdWhere(x.order_id))
  && (SKUWhere(x.product_sku))
  && (QuantityWhere(x.quantity))
  && (MoneyWhere(x.unit_price))
  && (MoneyWhere(x.line_total))
  && (x.line_total == x.unit_price * x.quantity)
  && (x.unit_price > 0)
}
datatype Order = Order(id: OrderId, customer_id: CustomerId, status: OrderStatus, items: set<LineItem>, subtotal: int, tax: int, total: int, created_at: int, updated_at: int, shipped_at: Option<int>, delivered_at: Option<int>)

predicate OrderInv(x: Order)
{
  (OrderIdWhere(x.id))
  && (CustomerIdWhere(x.customer_id))
  && (MoneyWhere(x.subtotal))
  && (MoneyWhere(x.tax))
  && (MoneyWhere(x.total))
  && (x.total == x.subtotal + x.tax)
  && ((|x.items| > 0 ==> x.total > 0))
  && ((x.status == SHIPPED ==> x.shipped_at != None))
  && ((x.status == DELIVERED ==> x.delivered_at != None))
  && ((x.delivered_at != None ==> x.shipped_at != None))
}

ghost predicate OrderInvGhost(x: Order)
{
  (x.subtotal == SumBy_LineItem_line_total(x.items))
}
datatype Payment = Payment(id: int, order_id: OrderId, amount: int, status: PaymentStatus, created_at: int)

predicate PaymentInv(x: Payment)
{
  (x.id > 0)
  && (OrderIdWhere(x.order_id))
  && (MoneyWhere(x.amount))
  && (x.amount > 0)
}
datatype InventoryEntry = InventoryEntry(sku: SKU, available: int, reserved: int)

predicate InventoryEntryInv(x: InventoryEntry)
{
  (x.available >= 0)
  && (x.reserved >= 0)
  && (SKUWhere(x.sku))
}

class ServiceState
{
  var orders: map<OrderId, Order>
  var products: map<SKU, Product>
  var inventory: map<SKU, InventoryEntry>
  var payments: map<int, Payment>
  var next_order_id: OrderId
  var next_payment_id: int
  var next_line_item_id: int
}

predicate ServiceStateInv(st: ServiceState)
  reads st
{
  (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> (forall item :: (item in st.orders[oid].items) ==> (item.line_total == item.unit_price * item.quantity)))
  && (forall sku :: (sku in st.inventory) ==> ((st.inventory[sku].available >= 0 && st.inventory[sku].reserved >= 0)))
  && (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> ((st.orders[oid].status !in {DRAFT, CANCELLED} ==> |st.orders[oid].items| > 0)))
  && (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> ((st.orders[oid].status in {PAID, SHIPPED, DELIVERED} ==> exists pid :: (pid in st.payments) && ((st.payments[pid].order_id == oid && st.payments[pid].status == CAPTURED)))))
  && (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> ((st.orders[oid].status in {DRAFT, PLACED} ==> forall pid :: (pid in st.payments) ==> ((st.payments[pid].order_id == oid ==> st.payments[pid].status != CAPTURED)))))
  && (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> ((st.orders[oid].status == CANCELLED ==> forall pid :: (pid in st.payments) ==> (((st.payments[pid].order_id == oid && st.payments[pid].status == CAPTURED) ==> exists rid :: (rid in st.payments) && ((st.payments[rid].order_id == oid && st.payments[rid].status == REFUNDED)))))))
  && (forall pid :: (pid in st.payments) ==> (pid < st.next_payment_id))
  && (st.next_line_item_id > 0)
  && (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> (forall item :: (item in st.orders[oid].items) ==> (item.id < st.next_line_item_id)))
  && (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> (oid < st.next_order_id))
  && (forall pid :: (pid in st.payments) ==> (st.payments[pid].order_id in st.orders))
  && (forall k :: k in st.orders ==> OrderIdWhere(k))
  && (forall k :: k in st.orders ==> OrderInv(st.orders[k]))
  && (forall k :: k in st.products ==> SKUWhere(k))
  && (forall k :: k in st.products ==> ProductInv(st.products[k]))
  && (forall k :: k in st.inventory ==> SKUWhere(k))
  && (forall k :: k in st.inventory ==> InventoryEntryInv(st.inventory[k]))
  && (forall k :: k in st.payments ==> PaymentInv(st.payments[k]))
  && (OrderIdWhere(st.next_order_id))
}

ghost predicate ServiceStateInvGhost(st: ServiceState)
  reads st
{
  (forall oid :: (oid in st.orders) ==> (st.orders[oid].total == SumBy_LineItem_line_total(st.orders[oid].items) + st.orders[oid].tax))
  && (forall k :: k in st.orders ==> OrderInvGhost(st.orders[k]))
}
